## SOLID Checks
- [ ] SRP preserved (classes/functions focused)
- [ ] DIP respected at boundaries (interfaces/use-cases)
- [ ] No cross-layer coupling introduced
- [ ] Error/loading states explicit and testable

## Scope / Small-change Check
- [ ] Single concern PR
- [ ] No out-of-scope features
- [ ] No unrelated refactors

## Release / Data Impact
- [ ] No data schema changes
- [ ] Increments DATA_SCHEMA_VERSION (document why)
- [ ] Changes backup format (update BackupSchemaContract)
- [ ] Affects app versioning or GitHub Pages deployment
- [ ] Requires documentation update
